days.summary: Tokyo begins gently, protecting Priya's arrival pace while Mei gets the city after dark.

activities.title: Shinjuku Gyoen National Garden
activities.rationale: A late, low-impact Tokyo start gives Priya an easy arrival while Ravi still gets a nature stop.

activities.title: Vegetarian ramen lunch
activities.rationale: A vegetarian-friendly, casual lunch protects the group budget before the single planned splurge dinner.

activities.title: Akihabara after dark
activities.rationale: Mei gets her non-negotiable Tokyo anime evening without forcing an early start for Priya.
activities.tension: Ravi gives up a late hiking prep night.

days.summary: A Fuji sunrise protects Ravi's must-do, then the group slows down across Hakone before continuing west.

activities.title: Mount Fuji 5th Station sunrise
activities.rationale: The one early, active day gives Ravi his named Fuji moment; a coach and viewpoint avoid a long trekking burden for Priya.
activities.tension: Priya compromises on one pre-dawn start.

activities.title: Lake Ashi scenic cruise
activities.rationale: A seated Hakone cruise gives Priya a low-friction recovery stop after Ravi's sunrise and keeps the route visibly shared.

activities.title: Vegetarian kaiseki at Hakone
activities.rationale: The itinerary's single splurge is a vegetarian dinner in Hakone, meeting Priya's ritual while every other meal remains casual.
activities.tension: Ravi accepts one premium meal in exchange for the Mount Fuji day.

days.summary: Kyoto gives Priya a cultural day with short, intentional stops before the final move to Osaka.

activities.title: Fushimi Inari lower torii walk
activities.rationale: The lower torii route gives Priya a meaningful Kyoto cultural moment without turning the day into a long climb.

activities.title: Nishiki Market vegetarian lunch
activities.rationale: A flexible Kyoto market lunch keeps food discovery high while preserving the single special-dinner budget rule.

activities.title: Gion tea ceremony
activities.rationale: A seated Gion ritual makes the Kyoto day feel intentional, not like a rushed transfer between major cities.

days.summary: Osaka closes on Mei's pace: playful city energy, good food, and one final shared skyline.

activities.title: Dotonbori vegetarian street-food crawl
activities.rationale: A casual Osaka food crawl keeps the final day social and protects the budget after the Hakone splurge.

activities.title: Den Den Town pop-culture stop
activities.rationale: Mei gets a second, optional pop-culture stop while the route stays compact for the whole group.

activities.title: Umeda Sky Building at sunset
activities.rationale: A shared Osaka finale gives everyone a skyline moment without adding another expensive nightlife commitment.

tradeoffs: Priya accepts one pre-dawn Mount Fuji start so Ravi gets his named sunrise; the coach and viewpoint limit the walking burden.
Ravi accepts one premium vegetarian kaiseki dinner in Hakone; every other meal stays casual to preserve the Japan-wide group budget.
Mei gets Akihabara after dark in Tokyo and an optional Osaka pop-culture stop, while the final evening remains low-cost rather than extending nightlife plans.
